## AI Asset Impact

- [ ] Prompt or system instruction changed
- [ ] Agent behavior changed
- [ ] Workflow orchestration changed
- [ ] Model or deployment changed
- [ ] Tool or connector permission changed
- [ ] Dataset, retrieval source, or data classification changed
- [ ] Evaluation criteria or threshold changed
- [ ] No material AI asset impact

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] Asset manifest updated
- [ ] Owner and accountable team confirmed
- [ ] Data inputs and classification documented
- [ ] Tool access remains least privilege
- [ ] Risks and mitigations updated
- [ ] Evaluations run or exception documented
- [ ] Release and rollback notes included
